hero.subtitle: AMANCE is committed to alleviating the suffering of the most vulnerable and preserving Cameroon's unique biodiversity. Together, let's build a sustainable and dignified future for all.

domains.title: Our Action Programs
domains.subtitle: Four complementary programs to alleviate human suffering, educate citizens, strengthen communities and protect Cameroon's unique biodiversity.

humanitarian.title: Putting Smile on People's Faces
humanitarian.desc: Direct support for people in difficulty: financial, medical and emergency material assistance, transparent and verifiable by all partners.

health.title: Communication & Education
health.desc: Empowering individuals to make informed choices for environmental protection and social well-being through digital media and educational programs.

community.title: Community Development
community.desc: Equipping communities with the skills to generate positive change: health, infrastructure, economic opportunities and multi-sector partnerships.

environment.title: Biodiversity Conservation
environment.desc: Halting biodiversity loss and restoring nature: reforestation, protected area management, sustainable agroforestry and wildlife conservation in Cameroon.

impact.title: A Concrete, Measurable and Sustainable Impact
impact.subtitle: Every action counts. Every donation transforms lives. Here is what we have accomplished together.

featured_project.title: Tomorrow's Forest
featured_project.desc1: In the heart of Cameroon's forests, our flagship conservation and reforestation project combines biodiversity protection and local economic development. We train rural communities in sustainable agroforestry, creating a replicable model nationwide.
featured_project.desc2: This project has already reforested more than 50 hectares of degraded forest, trained 80 farmers and improved the incomes of 200 rural families. It aligns directly with the United Nations Sustainable Development Goals (SDG 13, 15).
featured_project.floating_badge: of reforested forest in the East region

help.title: Join Us. Every Gesture Counts.
help.subtitle: Whether you are an individual, a company or an institution, there is a way to contribute to our mission and amplify our impact.

donation.title: Make a Donation
donation.desc: Your financial support is vital. It allows us to plan our actions, respond to emergencies and guarantee the sustainability of our projects on the ground.

partner.title: Become a Partner
partner.desc: Institutions, companies, NGOs: let's join forces for a multiplied impact. Contact us to explore synergies and collaboration opportunities.

volunteer.title: Become a Volunteer
volunteer.desc: Offer your time and skills. Join a passionate team and live an unforgettable human and professional experience on the ground in Cameroon.

item1.title: Emergency food distribution in the North-West region
item1.excerpt: The AMANCE team organized a food aid distribution for more than 200 displaced families in the North-West region of Cameroon.

item2.title: Launch of the reforestation program in Buea
item2.excerpt: In partnership with local authorities, AMANCE is launching an ambitious reforestation program aiming to restore 50 hectares of degraded forest.

item3.title: Agroforestry training for 80 farmers
item3.excerpt: AMANCE has trained 80 farmers from rural communities in sustainable agroforestry techniques, combining food production and environmental protection.

testimonials.quote: "Thanks to AMANCE, I was able to follow a training in sustainable agriculture. Today, I feed my family and sell my harvests at the local market. They haven't just changed my life — they have given hope back to our entire village."
testimonials.name: Marie Ngono
testimonials.role: Beneficiary — Community development program, Center Region

final_cta.title: Together, we can make a difference.
final_cta.subtitle: Join AMANCE and contribute to building a fairer, healthier and greener Cameroon. Every contribution, big or small, has a real impact on real lives.

hero.title: Who Are We?
hero.subtitle: AMANCE is a non-profit organization founded in Buea, Cameroon, dedicated to alleviating human suffering and conserving biodiversity.

mission.title: Mission, Vision & Motto
mission.mission_desc: To alleviate human suffering and advocate for biodiversity conservation. We act daily to support vulnerable people while preserving Cameroon's natural resources for future generations.
mission.vision_desc: "We envision a world respectful of the environment where poverty has been overcome, and where all human beings live in dignity."
mission.slogan_desc: "Speak up for those who cannot speak for themselves, to save lives for a safe environment."

items.1: Respect and promote adherence to the laws of the Cameroonian state
items.2: Bring members together around a common good and a shared vision
items.3: Support development projects and favor member growth
items.4: Help underprivileged people with financial, medical, and material assistance
items.5: Accompany rural communities through development and education initiatives
items.6: Promote biodiversity conservation and sustainable development education

values.title: What Guides Us
values.subtitle: Four essential values that guide each of our decisions and actions on the ground.

integrity.title: Integrity
integrity.desc: We align our words and actions. Honesty, consistency, and responsibility are at the heart of each of our daily actions.

compassion.title: Compassion
compassion.desc: We understand and feel the suffering of others. Our sincere desire to help guides every intervention in the field.

diversity.title: Diversity & Inclusion
diversity.desc: We work with people of different backgrounds, genders, religions, and perspectives. Every voice counts.

impact.title: Impact
impact.desc: We focus on actions that create the greatest impact, both for people and the environment where they live.

team.title: AMANCE Executive Office
team.subtitle: Committed and competent professionals, united by the same vision: building a fairer and greener Cameroon.

transparency.title: Our Commitment to Transparency
transparency.subtitle: AMANCE is committed to transparent and responsible management. All our official documents are accessible to our partners and donors.
transparency.doc1_desc: Founding document defining AMANCE's statutes, objectives, and operation.
transparency.doc2_desc: Complete assessment of our actions, completed projects, and measured impact on the ground.
transparency.doc3_desc: Annual accounts verified by an independent external auditor to guarantee transparency.
transparency.request_note: Document available upon request. Contact us at infos@amance.org

hero.title: Our Action Programs
hero.subtitle: Four complementary programs to alleviate human suffering, strengthen communities, educate citizens, and protect Cameroon's unique biodiversity.

smile.title: Putting Smile on People's Faces
smile.subtitle: Support for people in difficulty
smile.desc: This program supports people facing specific life challenges. Anyone in difficulty can share their situation with AMANCE. The association prioritizes emergencies and touching stories for direct, transparent assistance, verifiable by all partners.
activities: Financial, medical, and emergency material assistance for people in distress
Food distribution to displaced families and vulnerable communities
Support for orphans, isolated elderly people, and people with disabilities
Provision of beneficiary contact details for verification and confirmation
Transparent coordination with partners and benefactors
Dedicated section on the site to share emergencies and touching stories

education.title: Communication & Education
education.subtitle: Awareness and empowerment of citizens
education.desc: This program aims to provide individuals with the tools necessary to make informed choices in favor of environmental protection and social well-being. AMANCE promotes the use of digital media to raise awareness and mobilize around sustainable development goals.
activities: Awareness campaigns through digital and traditional media
Sustainable development education in schools and communities
Promotion of United Nations SDGs among local populations
Training youth in digital tools and communication
Environmental and health literacy workshops
Awareness about Cameroonian laws (forestry, environment)

community.title: Community Development
community.subtitle: Empowerment of rural communities
community.desc: AMANCE seeks to equip individuals and groups with the skills to generate positive changes in their communities. The program includes projects focused on health, infrastructural development, and economic opportunities, creating partnerships between different sectors and improving quality of life.
activities: Vocational training and development of local skills
Support for rural entrepreneurship and micro-enterprises
Construction and rehabilitation of community infrastructure
Education programs for out-of-school children
Economic development initiatives for rural communities
Capacity building for community leaders

conservation.title: Biodiversity Conservation
conservation.subtitle: Protection of Cameroonian ecosystems
conservation.desc: This program seeks to halt biodiversity loss and put nature back on the path to recovery. AMANCE works with conservation partners to restore ecosystems, conserve biodiversity, and enable sustainable livelihoods. We strengthen the protection of protected areas, restore forests and wetlands, and promote agroforestry.
activities: Reforestation and restoration of degraded forests and wetlands
Promotion of smart agriculture and agroforestry systems
Wildlife conservation (primates, elephants, reptiles, birds…)
Awareness against poaching and illegal species trade
Partnerships with protected area managers and national parks
Environmental education in forest-bordering communities

common.see_projects: See our projects in this field
common.cta_subtitle: Every contribution allows AMANCE to intensify its interventions and reach more vulnerable people and threatened natural areas.

principles.title: Our Governance Principles
principles.subtitle: The trust of our partners and donors is built on our unwavering commitment to these core values.

transparency.title: Transparency

hero.title: Legal Mentions
hero.subtitle: General information regarding our website and association.
hero.seo_desc: Legal information concerning the AMANCE association in Cameroon.

editor.title: 1. Site Editor
editor.p1: The AMANCE website is edited by the association Angel Mary Association for the Needy and Conservation Education, a non-profit association registered in Cameroon.
editor.location: Buea, Fako Division, South West Region, Cameroon

property.title: 2. Intellectual Property
property.p1: The entire site is subject to Cameroonian and international legislation on copyright and intellectual property. All reproduction rights are reserved, including for iconographic and photographic documents. The reproduction of all or part of this site on any electronic or paper medium whatsoever is strictly prohibited unless express authorization from the publication director.

liability.title: 3. Limitation of Liability
liability.p1: AMANCE endeavors to ensure to the best of its ability the accuracy and updating of the information published on this site, and reserves the right to correct its content at any time and without notice.
liability.p2: However, AMANCE cannot guarantee the accuracy, precision or completeness of the information made available on this site.

hosting.title: 4. Hosting
hosting.p1: This site is hosted by third-party providers guaranteeing data security and availability. For any technical questions concerning hosting, please contact us at the address provided above.

hero.title: Privacy Policy
hero.subtitle: How we protect and manage your personal data.
hero.seo_desc: AMANCE association personal data protection policy.

body.lead: The AMANCE association attaches great importance to the protection of the privacy and personal data of its users, donors and partners.

collect.title: 1. Data Collection
collect.p1: We collect personal data that you voluntarily provide to us when:

usage.title: 2. Data Usage
usage.p1: The information collected is exclusively used to:
items: Manage your donations and edit your tax receipts
Inform you of our actions and news (if you have consented)

sharing.title: 3. Data Sharing
sharing.p1: We commit to never selling, renting or exchanging your personal data to third parties for commercial purposes. Your data may only be shared with our technical service providers (hosting, donation platform) who are subject to strict confidentiality obligations.

rights.title: 4. Your Rights
rights.p1: In accordance with applicable regulations, you have a right of access, rectification, deletion and opposition to the processing of your personal data.
rights.p2: To exercise these rights, you can contact us at any time at the following address: infos@amance.org

security.title: 5. Security
security.p1: We implement all technical and organizational measures necessary to guarantee the security and confidentiality of your data against any unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure or destruction.
